tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are low, which may indicate decreased protein synthesis or increased loss. Lipid profile reveals high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including liver enzymes and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Renal and cardiovascular evaluation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
